svg.title: TitanCraft Crash Site V1 Beta visual evidence workaround
svg.desc: Text-diffable vector evidence replacing unsupported binary PNG placeholders. It documents the schematic focal point, route cue, crash landmark, and objective silhouette used by the V1 beta visual pass.
svg.text: TitanCraft Crash Site V1 Beta Evidence Workaround
Focal point: cyan objective marker. Route: orange path stripe. Landmark: off-white crash hull.
Text-diffable SVG replaces unsupported binary PNG placeholders; live Godot PNG capture remains a required external review gate.
